name: Attio
description: Attio is a flexible, data-driven CRM. Manage custom objects, people, companies, deals, lists, notes, tasks, and webhooks with powerful filtering and a relationship-first approach to customer data.

capabilities.name: objects_list
capabilities.description: List all system-defined and user-defined objects in the workspace.

capabilities.name: objects_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single object by its ID or slug.

capabilities.name: objects_create
capabilities.description: Create a new custom object in the workspace.

capabilities.name: objects_update
capabilities.description: Update a single object.

capabilities.name: records_list
capabilities.description: List records from any object with optional filtering and sorting.

capabilities.name: records_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single record by ID.

capabilities.name: records_create
capabilities.description: Create a new record in any object.

capabilities.name: records_update
capabilities.description: Update a record by ID. Multiselect values are appended.

capabilities.name: records_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a single record by ID.

capabilities.name: records_upsert
capabilities.description: Create or update a record using a unique attribute to find matches.

capabilities.name: records_search
capabilities.description: Fuzzy search for records across one or more objects.

capabilities.name: records_attribute_values_get
capabilities.description: Get all values for a given attribute on a record.

capabilities.name: records_entries_list
capabilities.description: List all list entries for which this record is the parent.

capabilities.name: attributes_list
capabilities.description: List all attributes defined on a specific object or list.

capabilities.name: attributes_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about a single attribute.

capabilities.name: attributes_create
capabilities.description: Create a new attribute on either an object or a list.

capabilities.name: attributes_update
capabilities.description: Update a single attribute on a given object or list.

capabilities.name: lists_list
capabilities.description: List all lists accessible to the access token.

capabilities.name: lists_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single list by ID.

capabilities.name: lists_create
capabilities.description: Create a new list.

capabilities.name: lists_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing list.

capabilities.name: list_entries_list
capabilities.description: List entries in a given list with filtering and sorting.

capabilities.name: list_entries_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single list entry by ID.

capabilities.name: list_entries_create
capabilities.description: Add a record to a list as a new list entry.

capabilities.name: list_entries_update
capabilities.description: Update a list entry attribute values.

capabilities.name: list_entries_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a single list entry by ID.

capabilities.name: notes_create
capabilities.description: Create a new note attached to a record.

capabilities.name: notes_list
capabilities.description: List notes for all records or a specific record.

capabilities.name: notes_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single note by ID.

capabilities.name: notes_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a single note by ID.

capabilities.name: tasks_list
capabilities.description: List all tasks sorted by creation date.

capabilities.name: tasks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single task by ID.

capabilities.name: tasks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new task.

capabilities.name: tasks_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing task.

capabilities.name: tasks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a task by ID.

capabilities.name: comments_create
capabilities.description: Create a new comment on a thread, record, or entry.

capabilities.name: comments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single comment by ID.

capabilities.name: comments_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a comment by ID.

capabilities.name: threads_list
capabilities.description: List threads of comments on a record or list entry.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all webhooks in the workspace.

capabilities.name: webhooks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single webhook by ID.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook and associated subscriptions.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update a webhook and its subscriptions.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook by ID.

capabilities.name: workspace_members_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all workspace members.

capabilities.name: workspace_members_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single workspace member by ID.

capabilities.name: identify
capabilities.description: Identify the current access token, workspace, and permissions.
